title: iberis glabrescens
intro: Iberis glabrescens, also known as rock candy or sweet candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis glabrescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Iberis glabrescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
